Key.English: Player Combat Support
ALiVE Combat Support System (CAS/Artillery/Transport)
Key.Chinesesimp: 现役作战支持系统（空对地/火炮/运输）

Key.English: Access Item Categories:
Custom Access Items (classnames):

Comma-separated list of additional item classnames that should grant Combat Support access on top of the Access Item Categories above. Use this for mod-supplied items that don't fit a registered category (e.g. a custom faction's command tablet, a campaign-specific radio). Classnames are matched literally and case-insensitively against the player's assigned items / uniform / vest / backpack. Example: "MyMod_CommandTablet, AnotherMod_FieldRadio". Leave empty for none.
Total number of times destroyed CAS aircraft can be replaced, shared across all CAS assets. 0 disables replacement.
CAS Respawn Limit:
Total number of times destroyed transport aircraft can be replaced, shared across all transport assets. 0 disables replacement.
Artillery Respawn Limit:
Total number of times destroyed artillery batteries can be replaced, shared across all artillery assets. 0 disables replacement.
Enable Debug:
Writes Combat Support diagnostic logging to the RPT (CAS engagements, guided delivery, RTB and the rearm-by-landing cycle).
Radio Messages (Audio):
Uses audible radio messages for support requests
Key.Chinesesimp: 使用音频无线电信息请求支持

Key.English: Transport Respawn Limit:
Time before a destroyed CAS, Transport or Artillery asset is replaced.
Respawn Time:

Pick one or more equipment categories. The player can call in Combat Support if they carry any item from any ticked category (e.g. Laser Designators covers vanilla and mod-supplied designator classes). Categories from unloaded mods drop off the list automatically. Defaults to Laser Designators. For mod-supplied items that don't belong to a registered category, use the Custom Access Items (classnames) field below to add their classnames directly.
Only one Combat Support module can be used
Key.Chinesesimp: 只能使用一个作战支持模块

Key.English: Place the module and sync it to SUP CAS, SUP Transport and/or SUP Artillery modules.
Support Access:

Who may call combat support from the tablet. 'First player only' (default) restricts it to a single operator per side; if that player leaves the game, the slot passes to another player automatically. 'All players' gives every player the support tablet.
You are not the assigned Combat Support operator.
